title: Real-world clinical actionability of comprehensive genomic profiling in advanced solid tumors
subtitle: Prospective single-center pan-cancer cohort · ESMO 2026 (poster)
marquee: A BRCA1 large rearrangement (exon 7 loss, fold change 0.15) in an HRD-positive breast cancer supported on-label PARP inhibition. OncoKB resistance variants (KRAS G12D, NRAS G13D/Q61L) flagged anti-EGFR ineligibility in 6 colorectal cases.
conclusion: Routine pan-cancer CGP at a Taiwanese tertiary cancer center yielded an on-label therapy match in roughly 1 in 3 advanced solid tumors — consistent with international cohorts. Patient reports openly browseable.
